pt-br.title: Debugger de treino
pt-br.subtitle: Treine a rede amostra por amostra e veja os pesos mudando em tempo real.
pt-br.pythonCode:
for epoca in range(4000):
    for x, y in dados:
        # Forward
        z1 = sum(w*xi for w,xi in zip(p['w1'],x)) + p['b1']
        h1 = max(0.0, z1)
        z2 = sum(w*xi for w,xi in zip(p['w2'],x)) + p['b2']
        h2 = max(0.0, z2)
        z3 = p['v1']*h1 + p['v2']*h2 + p['c']
        y_hat = 1/(1+exp(-z3))

        # Loss & Backprop
        d_out = (y_hat - y)
        d_z3 = d_out * y_hat * (1 - y_hat)
        d_h1 = d_z3 * p['v1'] * (1 if z1>0 else 0)
        d_h2 = d_z3 * p['v2'] * (1 if z2>0 else 0)

        # Weight update (SGD)
        for i in range(4):
            p['w1'][i] -= lr * d_h1 * x[i]
            p['w2'][i] -= lr * d_h2 * x[i]
        p['v1'] -= lr * d_z3 * h1
        p['v2'] -= lr * d_z3 * h2
        p['c']  -= lr * d_z3

en-us.title: Training debugger
en-us.subtitle: Train the network sample by sample and watch weights change in real time.
en-us.pythonCode:
for epoch in range(4000):
    for x, y in data:
        # Forward
        z1 = sum(w*xi for w,xi in zip(p['w1'],x)) + p['b1']
        h1 = max(0.0, z1)
        z2 = sum(w*xi for w,xi in zip(p['w2'],x)) + p['b2']
        h2 = max(0.0, z2)
        z3 = p['v1']*h1 + p['v2']*h2 + p['c']
        y_hat = 1/(1+exp(-z3))

        # Loss & Backprop
        d_out = (y_hat - y)
        d_z3 = d_out * y_hat * (1 - y_hat)
        d_h1 = d_z3 * p['v1'] * (1 if z1>0 else 0)
        d_h2 = d_z3 * p['v2'] * (1 if z2>0 else 0)

        # Weight update (SGD)
        for i in range(4):
            p['w1'][i] -= lr * d_h1 * x[i]
            p['w2'][i] -= lr * d_h2 * x[i]
        p['v1'] -= lr * d_z3 * h1
        p['v2'] -= lr * d_z3 * h2
        p['c']  -= lr * d_z3
